title: How to exclude weekends from recurring Tasks
excerpt:
Hey everyone, 
I’m totally new to Monday.com so am sure this has been asked before…but does anyone know how to exclude weekends when creating automating recurring Tasks? 
thanks in advance!

posts.author: NewtoMonday.com (Personal Info)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone,

I’m totally new to Monday.com so am sure this has been asked before…but does anyone know how to exclude weekends when creating automating recurring Tasks?

thanks in advance!

posts.author: patrick7 (Patrick Kool)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, welcome to Monday!

In the automations menu, choose something that starts with “Every time period”. (Example image attached).

Then, select ‘Weekly’ and only select Monday till Friday. (also added a screenshot)

That’s it!

Screenshot 2024-02-19 at 07.51.20854×552 13.1 KB

Screenshot 2024-02-19 at 07.52.00966×750 36.5 KB

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @NewtoMonday.com , if you are looking for a more powerful way of managing your recurring tasks on an item/task level instead of board level. Apart from a highly customizable time schedule, you can also set target group, status and due date to x days post item creation date.

Checkout our app here - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

And if you want to see the what the app can do for you, checkout the demo here - Schedule Recurring Tasks | Demo
